prompt: A cinematic waist-up portrait of a refined woman in an old-fashioned library, turned slightly to the left and seated or standing close to the camera, with her face centered and partly in soft shadow. She has golden blonde hair styled in an elegant Edwardian or early 20th-century updo with volume at the crown and loose curled strands framing the sides. She wears a high-necked cream-gold lace dress with intricate floral texture and delicate trim, plus one visible dangling earring. The setting is a warm, intimate study with 2 tall wooden bookcases filled with aged books in brown, green, and muted blue tones, and on the far left a softly glowing window with a sheer curtain beside 1 framed wall picture. Use golden-hour indoor lighting, amber highlights, shallow depth of field, rich wood tones, soft filmic contrast, realistic skin and fabric detail, and a quiet historical-drama mood. Compose it in a 16:9 frame, medium close-up, photorealistic, luxurious, subtle, and painterly without looking illustrated.
